name: E-10 rule deprecation lifecycle: migrate-rule replaces <old> with <new> in the profile's rules: block
command: printf 'rules:\n  old-rule: error\n' > p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/migrate-rule.sh" old-rule --to new-rule --profile p.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'new-rule:' p.yaml && ! grep -q 'old-rule:' p.yaml && echo replaced 1>&2
